quote: Our support ticket volume dropped by 62% within the first month. The chatbot handles everything from order tracking to product questions, and our customers actually prefer it to waiting for a human agent.
name: Sarah Chen

quote: The automation pipeline saved our team roughly 30 hours per week on lead qualification alone. We went from manually checking every inquiry to having AI-scored leads delivered right to our Slack in real time.
name: Marcus Rivera

quote: What impressed me most was the strategic thinking. It wasn't just about building a bot — they helped us rethink our entire content workflow. We now produce 4x the content with the same team.
name: Anika Patel
